phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah il bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah il bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare foto dentro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh DEN-troh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: No, non è consentito fare foto all'interno della chiesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH NOHN È kohn-sehn-TEE-toh FAH-reh FOH-toh ahll-'een-TEHR-noh DEHL-lah kee-EH-sah
likely_response.translation_en: No, taking photos inside the church is not allowed.

responses.english: No, taking photos inside the church is not allowed.
responses.phonetic: NOH NOHN È kohn-sehn-TEE-toh FAH-reh FOH-toh ahll-'een-TEHR-noh DEHL-lah kee-EH-sah
responses.french: No, non è consentito fare foto all'interno della chiesa.
